visual_description: A woman lies in a hospital bed, partially covered by a pink blanket, with medical equipment visible behind her. A man in a beige jacket leans over her, his hand resting on her abdomen as he looks down at her. Both are facing each other, with the woman’s gaze directed upward toward the man.
